ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "complaint_level" INTEGER /* Level of complaints recorded */,
  "former_complaint_num" INTEGER /* Number of previous complaints filed by the customer */,
  "former_complaint_fee" REAL /* Total fees associated with previous complaints */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's primary phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's residential or business address */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the service */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity (e.g., usage, payment, complaint) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer for loyalty and engagement */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred method of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_type" INTEGER /* Type of service provided (e.g., data, voice) */,
  "is_mix_service" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is bundled with other services */,
  "contract_type" INTEGER /* Type of contract associated with the service */,
  "contract_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract in months */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_price" REAL /* Monthly cost of the service */,
  "service_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the service */,
  "service_features" TEXT /* Features included in the service */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Date the service was activated */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* Date the service will end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the customer being billed */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fee charged for the service */,
  "month_traffic" REAL /* Amount of traffic used in the month */,
  "many_over_bill" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer exceeded their usage allowance */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the customer whose usage is tracked */,
  "online_time" INTEGER /* Total online time of the customer in hours */,
  "service1_caller_time" REAL /* Time spent on service 1 calls */,
  "service2_caller_time" REAL /* Time spent on service 2 calls */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being used */,
  "data_usage" REAL /* Amount of data used in MB */,
  "voice_usage" REAL /* Amount of voice usage in minutes */,
  "sms_usage" INTEGER /* Number of SMS messages sent */,
  "roaming_usage" REAL /* Amount of roaming usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the customer making the complaint */,
  "complaint_level" INTEGER /* Level of the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution status or comments regarding the complaint */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint */,
  "complaint_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the complaint */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint */,
  "assigned_rep" TEXT /* ID of the customer service representative assigned to the complaint */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the customer making the payment */,
  "pay_times" INTEGER /* Number of times the customer has paid */,
  "pay_num" INTEGER /* Total number of payments made */,
  "last_month_traffic" REAL /* Traffic used in the last month */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "is_late_payment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment was made late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution record */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint being resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_action" TEXT /* Action taken to resolve the complaint */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes on the resolution */,
  "resolution_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_resolutions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_details" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the customer with the contract */,
  "contract_type" INTEGER /* Type of contract associated with the service */,
  "contract_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract in months */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the contract will end */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "contract_renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the contract can be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the service */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)
